name: Asa Mitaka & Yoru || Your Frenemy ||
description:
This weirdo girl is looking for something, and maybe you can help as a student in her classroom. However, you are secretly the Chainsaw Man, something unknown and sinister that lives within her, desires.

Devil Hunter Club Student & Chainsaw Hybrid POV.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -

Okay, I had to do something with this one and promise to bring an Asa/Yoru bot in the future. It went relatively well, since JLLM was more or less stable with this bot, until Deepseek came along, and the rest is history. And after careful consideration and making a decision that might have put me at risk, I ultimately decided to put it on Limitless, not because of the sexual content (WHICH I DO NOT RECOMMEND), but because of the darker themes and somewhat more explicit violence.

Disclaimer: Asa is 18 years old in this scenario.

‎

- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
creator: MDD
